# Vehicle Disposal

> Manage end-of-life decommissioning of fleet vehicles through inspection, management approval, method selection (sale, auction, scrap, trade-in), disposal value recording, and final asset closure.

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fleet · vehicle · disposal · decommissioning · scrap · sale · finance

## What this does

Manage end-of-life decommissioning of fleet vehicles through inspection, management approval, method selection (sale, auction, scrap, trade-in), disposal value recording, and final asset closure.

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **vehicle** *(text, required)* — Vehicle
- **disposal_reason** *(select, required)* — Disposal Reason
- **current_book_value** *(number, optional)* — Current Book Value
- **disposal_method** *(select, required)* — Disposal Method
- **disposal_date** *(date, required)* — Disposal Date
- **disposal_value** *(number, optional)* — Agreed Disposal Value
- **proceeds_received** *(number, optional)* — Proceeds Received
- **buyer_details** *(text, optional)* — Buyer / Recipient Details
- **inspection_date** *(date, optional)* — Inspection Date
- **inspection_findings** *(rich_text, optional)* — Inspection Findings
- **approved_by** *(text, optional)* — Approved By
- **approval_date** *(date, optional)* — Approval Date
- **gain_or_loss** *(number, optional)* — Gain / (Loss) on Disposal
- **notes** *(text, optional)* — Notes
- **status** *(select, required)* — Status

## What must be true

- **disposal_date_recency:** Disposal date cannot be in the past more than 90 days without a documented reason
- **approval_required:** Finance manager approval is required before executing any disposal
- **sale_requires_buyer:** For sale or auction, disposal_value must be provided and buyer_details are required
- **gain_loss_computation:** Gain or loss is computed as disposal_value minus current_book_value; negative result is a loss
- **auto_end_assignments:** When the vehicle is disposed, all active driver assignments are automatically ended
- **cancel_maintenance_schedules:** All active scheduled maintenance tasks for the vehicle are cancelled on disposal
- **flag_insurance_for_cancellation:** Insurance policies for the vehicle are flagged for cancellation on disposal
- **disposal_records_permanent:** Disposal records are permanent and cannot be deleted once the status reaches disposed

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Disposal Cancelled** — when status is initiated, inspection_done, pending_approval, or approved; cancellation reason is provided, then Disposal is abandoned; vehicle remains in active fleet.
- **Vehicle Scrapped** — when status is approved; disposal_method is scrap, then Vehicle is scrapped; full book value is written off as a loss.
- **Vehicle Disposed** — when status is approved; disposal_date is provided; disposal method is sale or auction and proceeds_received is provided, then Vehicle is formally removed from the active fleet; gain or loss on disposal is recorded; final accounting entries are posted.
- **Disposal Approved** — when status is pending_approval; finance manager or operations manager authorises disposal, then Disposal is authorised and the vehicle can be physically transferred.
- **Inspection Recorded** — when status is initiated; inspection_date and inspection_findings are provided, then Inspection findings are recorded; disposal package can be submitted for approval.
- **Disposal Initiated** — when vehicle exists and is in active or decommissioned status; disposal_reason is provided, then Disposal workflow is started; vehicle is flagged for decommissioning review.

## Errors it can return

- `DISPOSAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED` — Disposal requires approval from a finance or operations manager before it can be executed.
- `DISPOSAL_MISSING_BUYER` — Buyer details are required for sale or auction disposal.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-depreciation** *(required)* — Current book value at disposal is sourced from the depreciation record; final disposal entries are posted
- **vehicle-master-data** *(required)* — Vehicle master status is set to decommissioned when disposal is complete
- **vehicle-insurance** *(recommended)* — Active insurance policies are flagged for cancellation when a vehicle is disposed
- **driver-vehicle-assignment** *(recommended)* — Active driver assignments are automatically ended when the vehicle is disposed
